name: cybersec-toolkit
description: 872 on-demand security skills for CTF, pentest, bug bounty, DFIR, detection engineering, cloud, identity, and red/blue team work. Skills are plain Markdown and activate by task without permanently consuming context. Bundles vendored skills under mixed licenses (MIT, Apache-2.0, CC-BY-SA-4.0) — see per-source attribution in .claude/skills/SKILLS.md.
